style_guide: Avoid conversation that does not involve Napoli Deli.

variants: Hey there! Welcome to Napoli Deli — what can I get started for you today?
Hey! Thanks for your interest in Napoli Deli. What can I get for you?
Welcome to Napoli Deli. Ready to order something good?
Hello! Thank you for choosing Napoli Deli. Can I get an order started for you?
Hey there! Welcome to Napoli Deli — what can I get started for you?
Welcome to Napoli Deli! What can I get started for you today?
Welcome to Napoli! What can I get started?
Hello welcome to Napoli, ready to place an order?
Sorry, I can only help with questions about Napoli Deli or placing an order.
I'm just here to help with placing an order or answering questions you may have about the business. Would you like to hear some of our most popular menu items?
Sorry — I can only help with Napoli Deli orders and store questions.
I can only help with Napoli Deli orders, menu, prices, hours, location, catering, and pickup questions.
Can I get an order started for you?
Just to confirm — can you clarify what you’d like?
I want to make sure I get this right — can you rephrase that?
I am having trouble understanding you. Can you please try rephrasing your wording?
I am misunderstanding or unable to answer. Please give our team a call at {business.phone}. We would be happy to help.
Perfect — let me read that back to make sure I’ve got it right.
Got you. Let me read your order back quick.
Okay — quick read-back and we’ll be all set.
Just to confirm, here’s your full order: {order_readback}.
Your total before tax is {order.total_before_tax}.
I’ll get this ready for you — your total will be confirmed at the counter when you pick up.
Payment will be taken at the counter upon pickup.
Do you want me to place this order?
Perfect — I’ve got it. See you soon at Napoli!
Sounds good. I’ve got you — see you soon!
All set. We’ll see you at Napoli in a bit!
You’re all set. See you soon!
Please stop this chat and contact emergency services at 911.
I can’t help with that. Please call the deli at {business.phone} and our team can help you.
I can’t help with that language. Please rephrase your order and I’ll take care of you.
For your safety, I can’t take allergy-sensitive orders here. Please call the deli at {business.phone} so our team can help you directly.
I’m not able to take that order here. Please call the deli at {business.phone} and we’ll help you there.
For bulk orders, please call the deli at {business.phone}. We’ll be happy to help you there.
I can’t help with questions about staff. I can help with orders and store questions — can I get an order started for you?
I’m not able to discuss staff information. Do you want to place an order or ask about the menu or hours?
We do have daily specials and soups, but they change often. Please call the deli at {business.phone} to hear today’s options and order them.
Yes, I can get that started — can I have a name for your order, please?
Sounds good — what name should I put the order under?
Got it. Before we start, can I have a name for your order?
Perfect — what can I get started for you?
Got it — what would you like to order?
Thanks, {order.customer_name}. What can I get started for you?
Got it, {order.customer_name}. What would you like to order?
Got it — I’ll update that.
No problem — updating that now.
You got it — making that change.
For {order.pending_item.name}, do you want that on a roll, a sub, or a wrap?
Got it — for {order.pending_item.name}, should that be a roll, sub, or wrap?
And for {order.pending_item.name}, roll, sub, or wrap?
For the {order.pending_item.quantity}x {order.pending_item.name} — do you want them all the same (roll/sub/wrap), or different? You can say "all plain rolls", "all subs", or specify each one.
No problem — roll, sub, or wrap?
Do you want that hot or cold?
Hot or cold?
Would you like that hot or cold today?

Sounds good — we’ll make that one hot.

Sure — you can do lettuce, tomato, onion, mayo, oil and vinegar, pickles, hot peppers, salt and pepper, things like that.
Yep — stuff like lettuce, tomato, onion, mayo, oil and vinegar, pickles, hot peppers, salt and pepper.
Toppings can be things like lettuce, tomato, onion, mayo, oil and vinegar, pickles, hot peppers, salt and pepper.
Got it.
Perfect — got it.
You got it.

We’re open Monday through Saturday, {hours.weekly_hours.monday.open} to {hours.weekly_hours.monday.close}. We’re closed Sundays. Breakfast runs until {business.menu_summary.breakfast.cutoff_time}.
Hours are Mon–Sat {hours.weekly_hours.monday.open}–{hours.weekly_hours.monday.close}. Closed Sunday. Breakfast ends at {business.menu_summary.breakfast.cutoff_time}.

We’re open Monday through Saturday from {hours.weekly_hours.monday.open} to {hours.weekly_hours.monday.close}, and we’re closed Sundays. Breakfast cutoff is {business.menu_summary.breakfast.cutoff_time}.
Drinks (including soda), cookies, chips, and candy are available in-store to add when you arrive.
Yes — drinks, cookies, chips, and candy are available in-store to add at pickup.

Coffee is available during breakfast hours only (breakfast time).

Perfect.

Okay.

For the {order.pending_item.name}, what wrap type should it be — white, wheat, tomato basil, or spinach?

Should I apply that to the last item only, or to every item you’ve ordered?

prompts.BUSINESS_WIFI_NO: No — we don’t currently offer Wi‑Fi.
prompts.BUSINESS_TAKEOUT_NO: No — we’re not currently offering takeout.
prompts.BUSINESS_ONLINE_ORDERING_NOT_AVAILABLE: No — online ordering isn’t available right now.
prompts.BUSINESS_CATERING_NOT_AVAILABLE: No — we don’t currently offer catering.
prompts.BUSINESS_PARKING_NOT_AVAILABLE: No — we don’t have dedicated parking.
prompts.BUSINESS_RESTROOMS_NO: No — we don’t have public restrooms.
prompts.BUSINESS_ACCESSIBLE_YES: Yes — we have a wheelchair‑accessible entrance.
prompts.BUSINESS_ACCESSIBLE_NO: No — we don’t have a wheelchair‑accessible entrance.

We can do limited changes, but full build‑your‑own isn’t available. Please call {business.phone} and our team can help.

prompts.BUSINESS_AVG_WAIT_TIME: Typical wait time is about {business.avg_wait_time_minutes} minutes.
prompts.BUSINESS_AVG_PRICE: Typical spend is about {business.avg_price_per_person_human} per person.
prompts.BUSINESS_VEGETARIAN_YES: Yes — we can make vegetarian sandwiches. For example, fresh mozzarella with arugula and roasted peppers, or a veggie sandwich with your choice of toppings. What would you like?
prompts.BUSINESS_VEGETARIAN_NO: We don’t have dedicated vegetarian options listed, but you can ask for modifications when ordering.
prompts.BUSINESS_VEGAN_MENU_YES: Yes — we have a dedicated vegan menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_VEGAN_MENU_NO: No — we don’t have a dedicated vegan menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_GLUTEN_FREE_MENU_YES: Yes — we have a dedicated gluten‑free menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_GLUTEN_FREE_MENU_NO: No — we don’t have a dedicated gluten‑free menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_KIDS_MENU_YES: Yes — we have a kids menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_KIDS_MENU_NO: No — we don’t have a kids menu.
prompts.BUSINESS_LOYALTY_YES: Yes — we have a loyalty program.
prompts.BUSINESS_LOYALTY_NO: No — we don’t currently have a loyalty program.
prompts.THANKS_YOURE_WELCOME: You're welcome. Anything else I can help with?

variants: Sure — which breakfast sandwich would you like? You can say something like “bacon egg & cheese”, “sausage egg & cheese”, or “ham egg & cheese”.
No problem — which side would you like? For example: fries, onion rings, garlic bread, or ziti.
Which salad would you like? For example: tossed salad, chef salad, potato salad, or macaroni salad.

ASK_DELI_WEIGHT: How much would you like? You can say “quarter”, “half”, “3/4”, “1 lb”, “1 1/4 lb”, “1 1/2 lb”, “1 3/4 lb”, or “2 lb”.
ASK_DELI_MODE: Just to confirm — for the {order.pending_item.name}, do you want that as a sandwich, or by the pound?
ASK_MEATBALL_MODE: Did you want that on a roll, sub, or wrap, or as a side of meatballs?
ASK_LUNCH_SANDWICH_TYPE: Sure — which lunch sandwich would you like? You can say something like “ham & cheese”, “turkey”, “Italian”, or a named sandwich like “DaVinci”.
prompts.HOT_ONLY_ITEM_CANNOT_BE_COLD: That item is hot-only — I’ll make it hot.

For rolls: plain, poppy seed, Portuguese, or knot roll. We also have plain or seeded sub, white/wheat/tomato basil/spinach wrap, panini (ciabatta), or bread. Which would you like?
Roll options are plain, poppy seed, Portuguese, or knot roll. Sub choices are plain or seeded. Wraps come in white, wheat, tomato basil, or spinach. We also have panini or bread.
